global.description: The ad features a dark background with a logo, headline, body text, price, and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial service with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that provides contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring geometric shapes, primarily in gray tones, positioned at the top center.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Abstract geometric shapes in gray, possibly representing a product or service, located in the center.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Small text in a simple font, conveying additional information, located in the center.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price label displaying '$4.99' in a clear font, positioned below the body text.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent 'Order now' button in a bold font, encouraging immediate action, located at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind $4.99 Order now

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold headline stating 'Your money, clearer' in a large font, positioned centrally above the call to action.
